clinical_notes.summary: 41yo female, 3-month post-anterior STEMI follow-up after primary PCI with DES to LAD. History of CAD, depression, hyperlipidemia. Exercise tolerance improving — now walks 20-30 minutes flat ground without chest pain vs. 5-10 min at discharge. Attending cardiac rehab twice weekly. Denies recurrent chest pain, palpitations, or syncope. Adherent to DAPT and all medications. Sertraline increased to 100mg daily with partial improvement in depression. Known lisinopril intolerance (dry cough) — on losartan. HR 62, BP 118/74, SpO2 99%. Regular rhythm, normal S1/S2, no murmurs. Lungs clear.

chest_xray.summary: Mild cardiomegaly with cardiothoracic ratio 0.52, slightly improved from post-infarct period. Lung fields clear bilaterally. No pulmonary vascular congestion or effusions. Sternal wires not present (PCI approach via radial access). No acute abnormality. Findings consistent with post-MI remodeling without current decompensation.

ecg.summary: Normal sinus rhythm at 62 bpm. Normal axis. Q waves in leads V1-V3 consistent with prior anterior MI (established). T-waves upright and symmetrical in anterior leads — no ongoing ischemia. PR interval 154ms. QRS 90ms. QTc 418ms. No new ST changes from prior. Findings stable compared to post-PCI tracing.

echo.summary: LVEF 42% (mildly reduced, improved from 35% at discharge 3 months ago). Anterior and anteroapical wall motion abnormality (hypokinesis) consistent with prior LAD territory infarct. No aneurysm formation. Small apical scar. Diastolic dysfunction grade I. Trace mitral regurgitation. Normal right heart. No thrombus. LV remodeling in progress with modest EF recovery post-revascularization.

heart_sounds.summary: Regular rate and rhythm at 62 bpm. S1 and S2 normal. No S3 or S4 gallop. No murmurs, rubs, or clicks. Heart sounds are normal at 3-month post-MI follow-up, reflecting stable hemodynamics and absence of significant mechanical complications from the infarction.

lab_results.summary: Troponin I: undetectable (no recurrent ischemia). LDL: 58 mg/dL (at goal on rosuvastatin 40mg — target <70 mg/dL for high-risk CAD). HDL 48 mg/dL. Triglycerides 142 mg/dL. HbA1c 5.4% (normal). Creatinine 0.8 mg/dL, eGFR >90 mL/min. Hemoglobin 12.6 g/dL (mild anemia, likely from dual antiplatelet therapy). Platelets 224 x10³/µL. INR 1.0 (not anticoagulated). BNP 112 pg/mL (mildly elevated, consistent with reduced EF).

medication.summary: Active medications: Aspirin 81mg daily (DAPT), Clopidogrel 75mg daily (DAPT — continue minimum 12 months post-DES), Losartan 50mg daily (ACE intolerance — lisinopril caused dry cough), Metoprolol succinate 50mg daily (post-MI beta-blockade, rate control), Rosuvastatin 40mg daily (high-intensity statin, LDL at goal), Sertraline 100mg daily (depression). Lisinopril allergy/intolerance documented. No drug interactions flagged. DAPT duration: 9 months remaining. Statin therapy ongoing indefinitely.
